hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "CONTEXT RESTORED:"; echo "  - Rules: .claude/rules/ (auto-injected by file path)"; echo "  - Prefer /clear over /compact for clean context"; if [[ -f tasks/todo.md ]]; then echo "  - Active tasks:"; head -10 tasks/todo.md; fi; echo "  - Re-read relevant files before making changes"'

hooks.prompt: Review the assistant's final response. You MUST respond with valid JSON only. Accept if: the user explicitly deferred or skipped items, the assistant is waiting for user confirmation, the project has no tests/lint to run, or the task is genuinely complete. Reject ONLY when the assistant CLEARLY makes excuses for incomplete work, blames pre-existing issues to avoid fixing, or lists problems without attempting to fix them. When in doubt, accept. Respond with {"ok": true} to accept or {"ok": false, "reason": "brief explanation"} to reject. Nothing else.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if command -v powershell.exe &>/dev/null; then powershell.exe -Command "[System.Media.SystemSounds]::Asterisk.Play()" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then osascript -e "display notification \"Claude Code finished\" with title \"Claude Code\"" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send "Claude Code" "Session finished" 2>/dev/null; fi'
